faqs.question: How do I know if I have a clothes moth infestation in my Lenox Hill apartment?
faqs.answer: Common signs include small holes in woolens, cashmere, or silk garments, webbing in closet corners, small tan or brown moths flying near wardrobes, and larvae casings on clothing or carpets. You may also notice damage to upholstered furniture, rugs, or other natural fiber items. Our Lenox Hill technicians provide thorough inspections to confirm infestations and identify all affected areas.

faqs.question: What does clothes moth control cost in Lenox Hill?
faqs.answer: Clothes moth control services in Lenox Hill typically range from $550 to $5,000, depending on the extent of the infestation, the size of your residence, and the number of treatments required. A standard one-bedroom apartment might cost $550-$1,200, while larger homes or severe infestations requiring multiple visits and extensive treatment can reach $5,000. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are your clothes moth treatments safe for my expensive wardrobe and antique textiles?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use targeted, fabric-safe treatments specifically designed to eliminate clothes moths without damaging delicate materials like cashmere, silk, wool, or antique textiles. Our technicians are trained in treating high-value items and work carefully around closets, storage areas, and upholstered furniture. We also provide guidance on proper garment care and storage to prevent future infestations.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a clothes moth problem in Lenox Hill?
faqs.answer: We understand that clothes moth infestations require prompt attention to prevent further damage to your valuable clothing and textiles.
